overall.description: First-person underwater swimming sequence from a video game. The player moves steadily through clear turquoise water over a rocky seabed with aquatic vegetation, approaching a dark rock overhang or cave entrance. Sunlight filters through the water surface creating a dappled lighting effect on the seabed.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow rocky seabed with aquatic plants

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily forward over the rocky seabed through clear turquoise water

entered.detail: rocky cliff face extending along the left side of the swimming path
uneven rocky bottom covered with small stones and pebbles
tall green seaweed swaying in the current
rippling surface of the water with sunlight penetrating through

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a tranquil underwater scene with the camera swimming forward over a rocky seabed. Tall green aquatic vegetation sways gently in the center of the frame while a rock wall extends along the left side. Sunlight filters through the water surface above, creating a serene blue-green environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching underwater rock overhang or cave entrance

events.description: player character's hands become visible at the bottom of the frame
approaching dark rock overhang that blocks the water surface ahead

agents.ego_description: swimming toward the rock formation ahead with hands visible in the lower frame

entered.detail: dark rock formation ahead creating a shadowed area or cave entrance

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches a large rock overhang or cave entrance, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. The player's hands briefly appear at the bottom of the frame, and the water surface becomes obscured by the looming rock formation ahead, transitioning from open water to a semi-covered area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that transitions from a bright, open seabed into the shadowed depths of a rocky overhang. It begins by gliding forward through serene blue-green water, passing tall green aquatic vegetation that sways gently beside a rocky wall. As the camera advances, the dappled sunlight filtering from the surface begins to fade, and the environment becomes increasingly enclosed. The scene then shifts toward a looming rock formation, with the player's hands briefly appearing in frame as the open water is obscured by the dark entrance of a cave.
